name: keyframe
description: Index videos locally and retrieve timestamped transcript, OCR, code, and frames through MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Search what tutorials say and show
interface.longDescription: Keyframe locally indexes public or local videos, then retrieves timestamped transcript, on-screen text, reconstructed code, and source frames for verification.
defaultPrompt: Index this tutorial and cite where the key idea is said and shown.
Find code shown in this video and verify it against the source frame.
Use this video to implement the demonstrated change and run its tests.
